title: Emails & activities - crashing
excerpt:

posts.author: JulesD (Julie Derevycka)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there,

Monday.com is crashing a lot because the email and activities threads are so long. I know there is the filter option, which is great. BUT we can only filter once the emails have stopped loading and this takes so long it crashes Monday.com

Does anyone have any ideas on how to fix this?

Thanks loads,
Jules

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Julie,

Hm this sounds a little strange… We might need our dedicated support team investigating this.

Would you be happy to reach out to our support team via our help-center with a visual demonstration of the behaviour you’re experiencing? This will help our team isolate what might be going wrong here
